pi_items.source: Official Cessna 172SP data sheets (Purdue Aviation LLC, WVFC Weight & Balance Tool). Multiple aviation sources consistently cite empty weight as 1676.2 lbs or approximately 1674.7-1676 lbs.
Official Cessna 172SP specifications. Maximum takeoff weight (normal category) is 2550 lbs. Utility category limit is 2200 lbs.
Calculated from verified empty weight (1676.2 lbs) + load weights: 350 + 150 + 180 + 50 = 1676.2 + 730 = 2406.2 lbs. Metadata value of 2330 is based on incorrect empty weight of 1600 lbs.
Official Cessna 172SP Weight & Balance data. Front Seats (pilot/co-pilot positions) arm is 37.0 inches from aircraft datum.
Load weight is task-specific and variable. Typical front seat occupant weights in aviation range from 100-200 lbs per person. 350 lbs represents 2 occupants totaling 350 lbs.
Official Cessna 172SP Weight & Balance data. Rear Seats (passenger positions) arm is 73.0 inches from aircraft datum.
Load weight is task-specific and variable. 150 lbs represents typical single passenger weight for this scenario.
Official Cessna 172SP Weight & Balance data. Fuel tanks arm is 48.0 inches from aircraft datum.
Task description specifies '180 lbs (30 gallons)'. Verified: Avgas weighs 6 lbs per US gallon (standard in aviation). 30 gallons × 6 lbs/gallon = 180 lbs. This is correct.
Official Cessna 172SP Weight & Balance data. Baggage Area 1 arm is 95.0 inches from aircraft datum. (Baggage Area 2 is at 123.0 inches)
Load weight is task-specific and variable. 50 lbs is a reasonable baggage weight for this scenario.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Avare weight and balance for a real aircraft: Cessna 172SP with verified specifications. VERIFIED FACTS: (1) Maximum gross weight is 2550 lbs (normal category), correct. (2) Station arms are: Front Seat 37.0 inches, Rear Seat 73.0 inches, Fuel 48.0 inches, Baggage 95.0 inches - all correct per official data. (3) Fuel weight 180 lbs equals 30 gallons at standard avgas density (6 lbs/gallon), correct. CRITICAL ERROR: Empty weight is stated as 1600 lbs, but actual Cessna 172SP empty weight is 1676.2 lbs. This causes the expected_total_weight (2330 lbs) to be incorrect; actual total should be 2406.2 lbs. Load weights (350, 150, 50 lbs) are task scenario choices and cannot be independently verified.
